---
title: "Untitled"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(car)
library(alr4)
library(leaps)
library(countrycode)

transit_cost <- read_csv("transitcost.csv")

```


```{r data cleaning}

clean_transit <- transit_cost %>%
  select(c(e, country, city, start_year, end_year, rr, length, tunnel_per, tunnel, stations, year, ppp_rate, real_cost, cost_km_millions)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(e) & real_cost != 0)

clean_transit <- clean_transit %>%
  mutate(real_cost = as.numeric(real_cost)) %>%
  mutate(rr = as.factor(rr)) %>%
  filter(end_year <= 2026) %>%
  mutate(duration = as.numeric(end_year) - as.numeric(start_year))

```



```{r region mapping}

clean_transit %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  count(sort = T)

gb <- filter(clean_transit, clean_transit$country == "UK") %>%
  mutate(country = "GB")

clean_transit<- subset(clean_transit, !e %in% c(7226, 7336, 7417))
clean_transit <- rbind(clean_transit, gb)
  

clean_transit$region <- countrycode(sourcevar = clean_transit$country,
                            origin = "iso2c",
                            destination = "region23")

df <- clean_transit %>%
  select(c(e, rr, length, stations, ppp_rate, real_cost, cost_km_millions, duration, region))

clean_transit %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarize(mean_cost = mean(real_cost), median_cost = median(real_cost), mean_duration = mean(duration, na.rm=T), mean_length = mean(length), mean_cost_by_km = mean(cost_km_millions)) 

```

```{r region_merge}

clean_transit <- clean_transit %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    region %in% c("Northern America", "Central America") ~ "North America",
    region %in% c("Southern Europe", "Northern Europe", "Western Europe") ~ "Europe",
    region %in% c("Central Asia", "Eastern Asia") ~ "Asia",
    region %in% c("South-Eastern Asia", "Australia and New Zealand") ~ "Oceania",
    region %in% c("Northern Africa", "South America") ~ "North Africa & South America",
    .default = region
  ))

```

```{r exploration}

#boxplots
ggplot(df) +
  geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(y = real_cost, fill = region))

ggplot(df) +
  geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(y = cost_km_millions, fill = region))


#scatterplots
ggplot(df) +
  geom_point(aes(x = length, y = real_cost, colour = region))

ggplot(df) +
  geom_point(aes(x = length, y = duration, colour = region))

```
